# GLKit Enumerations | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ GLKit ](/documentation/glkit)

- [ GLKit Enumerations ](/documentation/glkit/glkit-enumerations)

-  GLKit Enumerations 

API Collection# GLKit Enumerations

## [Topics](/documentation/glkit/glkit-enumerations#topics)

### [Enumerations](/documentation/glkit/glkit-enumerations#Enumerations)

[`enum GLKFogMode`](/documentation/glkit/glkfogmode)A mode that describes how the fog component is calculated for the fragment.[`enum GLKLightingType`](/documentation/glkit/glklightingtype)A constant that describes how lighting is calculated by an effect.[`enum GLKTextureEnvMode`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureenvmode)The mode used to combine the texture with other color components.[`enum GLKTextureInfoAlphaState`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureinfoalphastate)Values that describe the alpha information stored in a source image’s pixel data.[`enum GLKTextureInfoOrigin`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureinfoorigin)The location of the origin in the original source image.[`enum Code`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloadererror-swift.struct/code)Values to be returned when a texture loader encounters an error.[`enum GLKTextureTarget`](/documentation/glkit/glktexturetarget)The kind of texture pointed to by the property.[`enum GLKViewDrawableColorFormat`](/documentation/glkit/glkviewdrawablecolorformat)The format of the color renderbuffer.[`enum GLKViewDrawableDepthFormat`](/documentation/glkit/glkviewdrawabledepthformat)The format of the depth renderbuffer.[`enum GLKViewDrawableMultisample`](/documentation/glkit/glkviewdrawablemultisample)The format of the multisampling buffer.[`enum GLKViewDrawableStencilFormat`](/documentation/glkit/glkviewdrawablestencilformat)The format of the stencil renderbuffer.## [See Also](/documentation/glkit/glkit-enumerations#see-also)
